scripts.check: node --check main.mjs && node --check browser.mjs && node --check host-stages.mjs && node --check routes.mjs && node --check owner-graph.mjs && node --check quality-governor.mjs && node --check capture.mjs && node --check validate.mjs && node --check mutation-test.mjs && node --check evidence-status.mjs
scripts.validate:quick: npm run check && npm run validate:unit
scripts.validate:full: npm run validate:quick && npm run test:mutations && npm run validate:artifacts
